title: GK1H Traveler's Backpack+
description: Add-on for Tiviacz1337's Traveler's Backpack by GK1H.
body:
Add-on for Tiviacz1337's Traveler's Backpack by GK1H.

Features

Adds numerous items and tags to the acceptable tools for backpack tool slots, namely the c:tools and c:armors tags.
